reviewQueue.title: Review queue
reviewQueue.subtitle: Writer-submitted content awaiting your decision (publish or reject).

published.title: Publish this article now?
published.text: The article becomes public immediately and the writer is notified.

rejected.title: Reject this article?
rejected.text: It returns to the writer as rejected and they are notified.

comments.title: Comments moderation
comments.subtitle: Review reader comments — approve, reject, mark as spam, or delete.

empty.title: No comments
empty.description: Reader comments will appear here for moderation.

tags.title: Tags
tags.subtitle: Manage content tags — rename or delete, with usage counts.

confirm.deleteText: "{{name}}" will be removed from all content.

empty.title: No tags
empty.description: Tags appear here once content is tagged.

overview.title: Article analytics
overview.subtitle: Article fleet performance — real engagement, leaderboard, language, and featured impact.

publishTime.title: Publish-time performance
publishTime.subtitle: Avg views by publish hour (storage time)

watch.title: Watch behavior
watch.deferredNote: Completion / avg watch / drop-off / retention curve / loops / swipe-away / first seconds — require short-form player telemetry (a separate phase).

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.deferredNote: Impressions / feed discovery / recommendation attribution — require impression telemetry (a separate phase).

overview.title: Reel analytics
overview.subtitle: Reel fleet performance — real engagement, leaderboard, language, and featured impact.

publishTime.title: Publish-time performance
publishTime.subtitle: Avg views by publish hour (storage time)

player.unavailable: Video is not available for preview.

empty.title: No reels yet
empty.description: Start by creating your first reel.

confirm.forceText: «{{title}}» will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored.
confirm.publishText: The reel will become publicly available.
confirm.archiveText: The reel will be removed from public display.

form.featuredHint: Appears in the public featured reels.
form.mediaNotReadyHint: Cannot publish or schedule until a video is uploaded and finished processing.
form.unsavedText: You have unsaved edits. Leave without saving?

media.processingHint: Processing the video (renditions + thumbnail). Updates automatically.
media.failedHint: Video processing failed. Reprocess or replace the file.
media.replaceText: The current video will be detached from the reel and may be removed during cleanup.
media.removeText: The video will be detached from the reel (it stays in the central library).

errors.undecodable: Unreadable or unsupported video (no decodable stream).
errors.duration_exceeded: Video is too long for this content type.
errors.transcode_error: An unexpected error occurred during processing.
errors.source_missing: The source file is missing from storage.

page.title: Static pages
page.subtitle: CMS-managed pages — About us, Contact, Privacy policy, and similar

empty.title: No pages yet
empty.description: Start by creating your first static page.

confirm.forceText: «{{title}}» will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored.
confirm.publishText: The page will become publicly available.
confirm.archiveText: The page will be removed from public display.
confirm.draftText: This will undo the current published/archived state.

form.invalid: Some fields are missing or invalid.
form.unsavedText: You have unsaved edits. Leave without saving?
form.slugAutoHint: Auto-updates from the title until you edit it manually.
form.dirtyHint: You have unsaved edits — press Save or Ctrl/⌘+S.
form.snippetPlaceholderDesc: — SEO description will appear here. Write something engaging that motivates clicks. —
form.contentHint: Rich editor with strict allow-list matching the server-side sanitizer (TipTap).
form.seoHint: Title and description for better appearance in search results
form.seoTitlePlaceholder: Falls back to the page title if left blank
form.seoDescriptionPlaceholder: A short summary that appears in search results
form.workflowHint: Change the page state — publish, archive, or revert to draft
form.displayHint: Control where the page appears (header/footer) and its order
form.showInHeaderHint: Appears in the front-end top navigation.
form.templatePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default template

validation.titleMin: Title is too short (at least 2 characters).
validation.slugFormat: Slug must contain alphanumeric tokens separated by -.
validation.orderRange: Sort order must be a non-negative integer.

ai.autoNote: Generated automatically from the article text (no AI).

seo.title: AI SEO analysis
seo.hint: Get advisory feedback on the title, description and keywords.

rewrite.selectFirst: Select text first to rewrite it

analyze.title: Content quality analysis
analyze.hint: Advisory suggestions on repetition, structure and readability — never edits the text.

mediaStudio.title: Media studio
mediaStudio.hint: Images and video from the central shared library — attached when the article is saved

images.drop: Drag images here or click to select
images.dropHint: JPG / PNG / WebP — up to 5 MB — multiple files allowed
images.coverHint: Pick an image from the gallery and set it as cover via the star button.

video.drop: Drag video files here or click to select
video.externalPlaceholder: Paste a YouTube / Vimeo / TikTok / Instagram / MP4 link…
video.externalHint: Supported providers: YouTube, Vimeo, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, X, and direct MP4 links.
video.processingHint: The video is being processed into adaptive streaming in the background.

mediaLibrary.title: Media library
mediaLibrary.subtitle: Manage central assets: metadata, where they're used, and safe deletion.
mediaLibrary.search: Search by name, alt, caption or source…

detail.title: Asset details
detail.altHint: Describes the image for screen readers and search engines.
detail.caption: Caption
detail.noUsage: This asset is not used in any content.

delete.title: Delete asset?
delete.text: The asset and all its derivatives will be permanently removed.
delete.inUseText: This asset is used in {{count}} place(s). Force delete will remove it from those too. Continue?

media.saveFirst: Save the article first to manage media.
media.inlineNote: In-body images are managed directly from the body editor.

cover.title: Cover image
cover.removeText: The cover image will be removed from this article.
cover.hint: JPG / PNG / WebP — up to 5 MB. Used in cards and social shares.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.removeText: The image will be removed from the gallery.

video.title: Video
video.removeText: The video clip will be removed from this article.

liveCoverage.title: Live coverage
liveCoverage.notLive: This console is only available for live-coverage articles.
liveCoverage.readOnly: Posting updates is editorial-only. You can follow the timeline here.
liveCoverage.emptyHint: Post the first coverage update from the composer above.

card.deleteText: This update will be permanently removed from the timeline.

og.label: Share image (og:image)
og.hint: A dedicated social-share image that overrides the cover. Ideal size 1200×630.

articles.title: Articles
articles.subtitle: Manage news, opinions, and live coverage content

confirm.deleteText: «{{title}}» will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
confirm.clearBreakingText: The «breaking» flag will be removed from every article. Are you sure?
confirm.clearPinnedText: The «pinned» flag will be removed from every pinned article. Are you sure?
confirm.removePlacementText: The article will be removed from «{{zone}}».
confirm.forceDeleteText: «{{title}}» will be permanently deleted with no way to restore it. Are you sure?

share.title: Share & preview
share.hint: The article's permanent link on the website, plus social share actions.
share.copyFailed: Copy failed. Copy the link manually.
share.saveToShare: Save the article to enable share links.

preview.title: Article preview
preview.hint: Matches what readers will see based on the current draft.
preview.trueHint: Rendered by the server exactly as published — same HTML, media and SEO.

seoGuidance.title: SEO guidance
seoGuidance.title_ok: Title length is good for search results.
seoGuidance.title_too_long: Title is long ({{length}} chars) — keep it under {{max}} for search results.
seoGuidance.title_too_short: Title is short ({{length}} chars) — aim for at least {{min}}.
seoGuidance.description_missing: No SEO description or excerpt — add one for better snippets.
seoGuidance.description_too_long: Description is long ({{length}} chars) — keep it under {{max}}.
seoGuidance.description_short: Description is short ({{length}} chars) — aim for at least {{min}}.
seoGuidance.cover_missing: No cover/share image — social cards and structured data are weaker.
seoGuidance.seo_title_derived: No custom SEO title — the article title is used.
seoGuidance.canonical_overridden: Canonical points elsewhere — this version may not be indexed.
seoGuidance.robots_noindex: Robots is set to noindex — this article will not be indexed.

form.secBodyHint: Rich editor with strict allow-list matching the server-side sanitizer (TipTap).
form.secSeoHint: Title, description, and keywords for search engines
form.secTaxonomyHint: Pick one or more — all equal
form.categoriesHelp: Select at least one category; you may pick any number.
form.noCategories: No categories available for this type/locale.
form.secOpinionAuthorHint: A user with the writer flag (is_writer)
form.secTagsHint: Aids indexing and discovery — up to 30 tags
form.secFlagsHint: Surface the story in display zones and control interaction
form.title: Title
form.subtitle: Subtitle
form.slugAutoHint: Leave blank to auto-generate from the title.
form.secondaryHelp: Up to 3 secondaries. Not available for opinion articles.

author.startTyping: Type to search, or browse existing writers.

quickAdd.title: Add a new writer
quickAdd.hint: Quick-create a writer account. The writer flag is set automatically.
quickAdd.avatarHint: PNG / JPG / WebP — used as the writer photo and cover fallback.
quickAdd.avatarFailed: Failed to upload the writer photo.
quickAdd.name: Full name
quickAdd.passwordHint: Auto-generated to satisfy password requirements. Override or regenerate as needed.
quickAdd.sendInviteHint: The writer receives a secure link to set their own password.

form.isPinnedHint: Pins the article to the top of its category and feeds (hero/latest) — it shows first, ahead of newer stories.
form.isBreakingHint: Shows in the breaking-news ticker (fast lane). Use sparingly for urgent stories.
form.isFeaturedHint: Promotes the article into the homepage slider.
form.isHeaderHint: Surfaces the article in the latest-updates header strip.
form.isEditorPickHint: Marks the article as an editor's pick for curated zones.
form.seoTitlePlaceholder: Falls back to the article title if left blank
form.seoDescriptionPlaceholder: Falls back to the excerpt if left blank
form.seoSnippetPreview: As it would appear in search results
form.bodyImageHint: Save the article first, then you can upload inline images from the editor toolbar.

tags.placeholder: Type a tag then press Enter…
tags.help: Live suggestions from the existing tag pool; Enter to add, Backspace to remove last.

cockpit.summaryHint: Subtitle and excerpt — shown in cards, search results, and social.
cockpit.bodyHint: Write the article. Add inline images, embeds, and links from the toolbar.
cockpit.advancedSeoHint: Optional — sensible defaults are derived from the title and excerpt.
cockpit.advancedMetaHint: Slug, canonical URL, and robots — auto-handled unless you override.
cockpit.settingsHint: Type and language — drive sections and publishing rules.
cockpit.author: Author

validation.slug: Slug must contain alphanumeric tokens separated by -.
validation.opinionNoSecondary: Opinion articles cannot have secondary categories.
validation.primaryInSecondary: Primary category cannot also be a secondary.
validation.opinionAuthorRequired: An opinion author must be selected.
validation.formInvalid: Some fields are missing or invalid.

workflow.title: Publishing workflow
workflow.hint: Available transitions depend on the current status and your role
workflow.noActions: No transitions available from this status.

draft.title: Move article back to draft?
draft.text: This will undo the current published/scheduled state.

submitted.title: Submit article for review?
submitted.text: The article will appear in the editorial review queue.

in_review.title: Start the review?
in_review.text: The article will be marked as under review.

scheduled.title: Schedule the publication?
scheduled.text: The article will auto-publish at the chosen time.

published.title: Publish the article now?
published.text: The article will be visible to the public immediately.

rejected.title: Reject the article?
rejected.text: It will be returned to the author as rejected.

archived.title: Archive the article?
archived.text: The article will be hidden from public listings.

bulk.deleteText: {{count}} categories will be deleted. Categories with children will be skipped.

trash.title: Trash
trash.forceText: «{{name}}» will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored. Sure?
trash.bulkDeleteText: {{count}} categories will be permanently deleted and cannot be restored. Categories still primary for articles will be skipped.

confirm.deleteText: «{{name}}» will be deleted. Are you sure?

form.createHint: Add a new category to the editorial hierarchy.
form.name: Category name

validation.nameRequired: Category name is required (at least 2 characters).

placements.title: Editorial placements
placements.subtitle: Control where articles surface per zone, locale, and time window

list.empty: No placements in this zone yet
list.emptyHint: Add an article to this zone to see it here.

form.createHint: Pick an article in the same locale and set ordering and time window.
form.editHint: Moving an article to a different zone/locale requires deleting this and creating a new one.
form.eligibilityHint: Showing published articles in the selected locale only — backend guard requires a locale match.
form.noArticles: No matching articles in this locale.
form.lockedArticleHint: To swap the article, delete this placement and create a new one.
form.windowHint: Leave both blank for a permanent placement. ends_at is most useful for breaking.
form.invalidPosition: Position must be a non-negative integer.

confirm.deleteText: «{{title}}» will be removed from this zone. The article itself stays.

tool.imageSaveFirst: Save the article first to upload images

link.title: Insert / edit link
link.invalid: URL is invalid or uses an unsupported scheme.

embed.title: Insert embed
embed.hint: Paste a URL from a supported provider — it will be resolved server-side.
embed.supported: Supported providers: YouTube, Vimeo, Twitter/X, Facebook, Instagram.

poll.title: Insert poll
poll.hint: Search for an existing poll and select it to embed.
poll.label: Poll
